==Biography==
Chrisberg played a lot of FPS games when he was younger and he thought League of Legends was nothing interesting. But his cousin really wanted to play it with him, so he started playing and wanted to be better than his cousin who was Gold. After reaching Gold himself, he kept on playing all the way till he reached challenger. He became good friends with the Spanish Support [[Skain]], who suggested Chrisberg to [[G2 Vodafone]]. He won the tryout and officially started on his professional gaming career.

== Trivia ==
* Barcelona fan.
* Loves lasagna.
* Likes to watch Game of Thrones.
* Likes [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Faxe_Kondi Faxe Kondi].
